title: Briefing Package for the Minister of Environment and Climate Change and Minister responsible for Parks Canada to appear before the Standing Senate Committee on Energy, the Environment and Natural Resources (ENEV) for its study of Bill C-76, An Act to Amend the Canada National Parks Act on October 1, 2024 - Open Government Portal
content:
